name: Stuffed Cantaloupe
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sour cream or heavy whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a slice off the top of the cantaloupe and scoop out the fruit with a melon-ball cutter.
2. Marinate the melon balls in wine until serving time.
3. In a bowl, blend together the cheeses and cream. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Lightly fill the cantaloupe shell with the cheese mixture.
5. If needed, cut the rim of the shell jaggedly to form a "basket edge."
6. To serve, spear melon balls with toothpicks and dip them into the cheese mixture for an appetizer that is both pretty and refreshing.
7. Makes about 1 cup cheese mixture and approximately 20 melon balls.
